en_sentence: I carry apples in a basket to the picnic.
zh_sentence: 我用籃子把蘋果帶到野餐。

en_sentence: We go to church on Sunday morning.
zh_sentence: 我們星期天早上去教堂。

en_sentence: My grandfather used to hunt in the forest.
zh_sentence: 我爺爺以前在森林裡打獵。

en_sentence: The ball will roll down the hill.
zh_sentence: 球會從小山滾下來。

en_sentence: Please hang your coat on that hook.
zh_sentence: 請把外套掛在那個掛勾上。

en_sentence: I eat a snack after school every day.
zh_sentence: 我每天放學後都吃點心。

en_sentence: He uses a tool to fix the bike.
zh_sentence: 他用工具修理自行車。

en_sentence: I write a letter to my friend every week.
zh_sentence: 我每週都給朋友寫一封信。

en_sentence: Put the letter inside the envelope.
zh_sentence: 把信放進信封裡。

en_sentence: The children sit on the ground to play.
zh_sentence: 孩子們坐在地面上玩。

en_sentence: The flag of the R.O.C. flies on the building.
zh_sentence: 中華民國的國旗飄揚在那棟建築上。

en_sentence: He dreams of traveling around the world.
zh_sentence: 他夢想環遊世界。

en_sentence: She plants a seed in the pot.
zh_sentence: 她在花盆裡種下一粒種子。

en_sentence: I have no other ideas right now.
zh_sentence: 目前我沒有其他想法。

en_sentence: Please taste the soup and tell me if it needs salt.
zh_sentence: 請嚐嚐湯，告訴我是否需要加鹽。

en_sentence: I smell cookies baking in the oven.
zh_sentence: 我聞到烤箱裡餅乾的香味。

en_sentence: Do you hear the sound of birds in the morning?
zh_sentence: 你聽到早晨鳥兒的聲音嗎？

en_sentence: I feel cold when I go outside without a coat.
zh_sentence: 如果我不穿外套出門，我會感到寒冷。

en_sentence: They lived in a large house near the lake.
zh_sentence: 他們住在靠近湖邊的一棟大房子裡。

en_sentence: This box is too heavy for me to lift.
zh_sentence: 這個箱子對我來說太重了，無法抬起。

en_sentence: I will try my best on the exam.
zh_sentence: 我會在考試中盡力而為。

en_sentence: This chair is very comfortable to sit on.
zh_sentence: 這張椅子坐起來非常舒適。

en_sentence: She felt successful after finishing the race.
zh_sentence: 她跑完比賽後感到很成功。

en_sentence: The famous singer visited our school.
zh_sentence: 那位有名的歌手來訪我們學校。

en_sentence: She takes care of her little brother every day.
zh_sentence: 她每天照顧她的弟弟。

en_sentence: Be careful when you cross the street.
zh_sentence: 過馬路時要小心。

en_sentence: The neighbors are very friendly to us.
zh_sentence: 鄰居對我們非常友善。

en_sentence: We picked fresh strawberries from the farm.
zh_sentence: 我們從農場採摘了新鮮的草莓。

en_sentence: The cake tastes sweet and soft.
zh_sentence: 蛋糕嘗起來甜美又鬆軟。

en_sentence: Each student must bring a pencil to class.
zh_sentence: 每個學生都必須帶鉛筆來上課。

en_sentence: The children love to swing at the playground.
zh_sentence: 孩子們喜歡在遊樂場的鞦韆上搖擺。

en_sentence: Please slide the door open slowly.
zh_sentence: 請慢慢地把門滑開。

en_sentence: He likes to hide behind the tree during games.
zh_sentence: 他喜歡在遊戲時躲在樹後面。

en_sentence: We celebrate our birthday at a restaurant.
zh_sentence: 我們在餐廳慶祝生日。

en_sentence: Be careful not to drop the vase.
zh_sentence: 小心別把花瓶掉落。

en_sentence: Please help me move the table to the corner.
zh_sentence: 請幫我把桌子搬到角落。

en_sentence: Paste the picture into your notebook.
zh_sentence: 把圖片黏貼到你的筆記本上。

en_sentence: He wants to become a doctor when he grows up.
zh_sentence: 他長大後想成為一名醫生。

en_sentence: There are many shops around the school.
zh_sentence: 學校附近有很多商店。

en_sentence: I want more pages to read.
zh_sentence: 我想要更多頁面來閱讀。

en_sentence: She has the most stickers in the class.
zh_sentence: 她在班上擁有最多的貼紙。

en_sentence: Whose backpack is this on the desk?
zh_sentence: 桌上的書包是誰的？

en_sentence: My brother is taller than me.
zh_sentence: 我哥哥比我高。

en_sentence: My heart beats fast when I run.
zh_sentence: 我跑步時心臟跳得很快。

en_sentence: He holds the book in his arm.
zh_sentence: 他用手臂抱著書。

en_sentence: Please clean under your nails after playing.
zh_sentence: 玩完後請把指甲底下清乾淨。

en_sentence: He fell and hurt his knee during the game.
zh_sentence: 他在遊戲中跌倒，膝蓋受傷了。

en_sentence: Carry your bag on one shoulder.
zh_sentence: 把書包掛在一邊肩膀上。

en_sentence: This is the best part of the story.
zh_sentence: 這是故事中最精彩的部分。

en_sentence: Take a rest before you continue studying.
zh_sentence: 在繼續學習前先休息一下。

en_sentence: The teacher shows the video on the screen.
zh_sentence: 老師在螢幕上播放影片。

en_sentence: The puppy plays with a ball in the yard.
zh_sentence: 幼犬在院子裡玩球。

en_sentence: Put the lid on the jar after you finish.
zh_sentence: 用完後把蓋子蓋上罐子。

en_sentence: The bird sings in its cage every morning.
zh_sentence: 那隻鳥每天早上在籠子裡唱歌。

en_sentence: The mountain view is a beautiful sight.
zh_sentence: 那座山的景象非常美麗。

en_sentence: The secretary answers phone calls at the office.
zh_sentence: 秘書在辦公室接電話。

en_sentence: Write a list of things you need to buy.
zh_sentence: 寫一張你需要購買物品的清單。

en_sentence: I bought a new pair of shoes today.
zh_sentence: 我今天買了一雙新鞋。

en_sentence: Use a pin to attach the note to the board.
zh_sentence: 用大頭針把便條釘在板子上。

en_sentence: The plumber fixed the broken pipe under the sink.
zh_sentence: 水電工修好了水槽下壞掉的水管。

en_sentence: He likes his coffee at medium temperature.
zh_sentence: 他喜歡中等溫度的咖啡。

en_sentence: My aunt is married to a doctor.
zh_sentence: 我的阿姨已婚，她的丈夫是一位醫生。

en_sentence: They live in a modern house with big windows.
zh_sentence: 他們住在一棟有大窗戶的現代房子裡。

en_sentence: She studies foreign languages at school.
zh_sentence: 她在學校學習外國語。

en_sentence: They fly the national flag at the town square.
zh_sentence: 他們在鎮廣場上升起國旗。

en_sentence: Only a few students stayed after class for help.
zh_sentence: 只有少數學生下課後留下來請教。

en_sentence: This dictionary is very useful for learning new words.
zh_sentence: 這本字典對學習新單字非常實用。

en_sentence: The tutor gave me helpful tips for studying.
zh_sentence: 家教給了我一些有幫助的學習建議。

en_sentence: She finished her homework in the least amount of time.
zh_sentence: 她用最少的時間完成了作業。

en_sentence: The blind student reads with a special device.
zh_sentence: 那位盲人學生用特殊設備閱讀。

en_sentence: Please tidy your desk before you leave.
zh_sentence: 離開前請整理好你的書桌。

en_sentence: I believe in working hard to achieve my goals.
zh_sentence: 我相信努力工作可以實現我的目標。

en_sentence: We celebrate Teacher's Day with a small party.
zh_sentence: 我們用小型派對慶祝教師節。

en_sentence: They laugh at the funny joke during recess.
zh_sentence: 課間休息時他們因為那個好笑的笑話而笑。

en_sentence: She will lead the team in the next game.
zh_sentence: 她將在下一場比賽中領導球隊。

en_sentence: We meet our friends at the playground after school.
zh_sentence: 放學後我們在遊樂場與朋友碰面。
